content.en:
At this moment, Ye Tian had already used the immeasurable blood to refine his whole body to the point of refining it all over again, and he only needed to break this shackle to make his whole body transform and step into the fourth stage.

Now, Ye Tian is about to break through.

Click!!

The shackles in the underworld were forcibly shattered by Ye Tian's 129,600 drops of immeasurable blood, and the flesh and blood body stepped into a new stage.

Countless energies poured into Ye Tian's body, assisting the immeasurable blood to enhance the flesh and blood.

The speed of this ascension is too fast, there is no limit at all, and the physical body becomes stronger at an incredible speed, getting stronger every second.

This process of transformation will last for a long time, but fortunately, no one bothers him, and he can break through with confidence.

After a long time, the breakthrough finally ended.

"I've broken through, and now I'm a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

As soon as he broke through, his current strength was far crushing his previous self, and he was afraid that he would be able to kill a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform like Junshan Great Ancestor with his hands.

Even among the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, his strength is estimated to be among the top ranks.

"Try the effect of the Infinite Blood Stone!"

Ye Tian took out some immeasurable blood gold stones, absorbing the energy in them and refining himself with immeasurable blood.

Rumble!!!!

Streams of pure energy continued to refine Ye Tian's flesh and blood, and the whole body was tempered together, and the effect was very good.

Subsequently, he did not use the immeasurable blood gold stone to refine his whole body, but relied on himself to absorb the energy of the outside world to refine his whole body.

Outcome.

"There is hardly any progress!"

Only then did Ye Tian understand why the strength of those fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms was very weak, if there were no resource treasures like the Immeasurable Blood Gold Stone, if they only relied on ordinary resources, let alone tens of millions of realm first years, even if it was billions of realm first years, there would be almost no progress!

"Fortunately, I have obtained so many immeasurable blood gold stones, otherwise it would be difficult for my strength to improve for a long time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, even if there were so many immeasurable blood stones, it would be almost unrealistic for him to quickly improve his strength and impact to the fifth stage.

The gap between the fourth stage and the fifth stage is very large.

The fourth stage is mainly to use immeasurable blood to quench the whole body, so that the body can be transformed again and again, and after the general fourth stage high-level immeasurable life form has been tempered nine times, it can go to the fifth stage.

And Ye Tian felt that he must have been refining more than nine times, maybe a dozen times.

However, the more times the whole body is tempered, the more difficult it is to continue to temper.

Maybe in the future, even the effect of the Infinite Blood Gold Stone may not be good, and more advanced resources are needed to complete the whole body tempering.

"Take your time, first replace all the other copy bodies with the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable life form realm!"

Soon, all of Ye Tian's duplicate bodies were replaced, and they all possessed the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable life body cultivation.

Moreover, Ye Tian also lifted the third-stage immeasurable ruin monster and copied a fourth-stage immeasurable ruin monster, so that the ability to save life in the immeasurable realm ruins would be greatly increased.

......

Copper Mountain City.

In the depths of a majestic hall.

Junshan Great Ancestor was lying in a pool of blood, and countless materials around him were integrated into the pool of blood to help him heal.

However, even so, he still did not keep the fourth-stage cultivation, and currently only had the third-stage cultivation, and the immeasurable blood only kept 30,000 drops.

It can be said that his current strength has been greatly reduced, and he is a little more powerful than the ordinary third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

In Copper Mountain City, there are many third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms that are more powerful than him, and he is no longer qualified to become the deputy city lord of Copper Mountain City.

It can be said that he is now completely useless.

Abrupt.

The void twisted, and a figure walked out.

When Junshan Great Ancestor saw the comer, he hurriedly said, "Big brother, you must avenge me!!"

The person who came was the lord of Copper Mountain City, the Great Ancestor of Copper Mountain.

Seeing the tragic situation of Junshan Great Ancestor, Tongshan Great Ancestor couldn't help but sigh and said: "Junshan, I don't want to avenge you, but you also saw it last time, and I can't help Endless Great Ancestor at all." However, the Infinite Ancestor was badly injured in order to deal with you. Even if he had some anti-heaven treasures that could make up for the foundation, he would definitely be affected, and it would be difficult to become the fourth stage. Moreover, he did not necessarily recover from his injuries. "

"Whether that Endless Ancestor hurt the foundation or not, I don't care, I want him to die!"

Junshan Great Ancestor said angrily.

The Copper Mountain Ancestor was silent for a moment, and then said: "It's not that there is no way, judging from the current situation, that Endless Ancestor really doesn't have any special background. Even if he has some special means, and his combat power is stronger than that of ordinary fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, it is not impossible for forces to dare to deal with him. I got in touch with an outsider force, which was not as powerful as the Outsider Alliance. They want to establish a stronghold in the Genki Territory, and I am ready to cooperate with them to lead the Copper Mountain to them as a stronghold. And they can work with us to deal with the Endless Great Ancestor, and the benefits obtained are half divided. "

"That's great!"

Junshan Great Ancestor said excitedly.

"Junshan, you heal well, and there is no hope for recovery in the future. If he achieves the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable life form realm, maybe he can find a way to restore you. "

"Thank you, big brother!"

Junshan Dazu regained hope.

And after the Great Ancestor of Tongshan left here, he contacted that outside force, the Void Gate!

......

this day.

The two fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the Void Gate came to Copper Mountain Leader Copper Mountain City.

They are the Xuanying Great Ancestor and the Void Great Ancestor.

The most powerful of them was the Xuanying Great Ancestor, who had already completed three full-body refinements, and the Void Great Ancestor had also completed two full-body refinements.

As for the Copper Mountain Great Ancestor, he has only completed two full-body tempering exercises so far.

The Castle Lord's Mansion of Copper Mountain City.

The Great Ancestor of Tongshan met with the Great Ancestor of Xuanying and the Great Ancestor of Emptiness to discuss cooperation.

Soon, they discussed the Endless Great Ancestor.

At this time, the Xuanying Great Ancestor said: "Our Void Gate has also investigated the Endless Great Ancestor during this time, and with our strength, we are sure to kill the other party." However, the Golden Divine Armor Stone on the Endless Great Ancestor and the token of the Silver Heng Heavenly Ancestor must belong to us, and the other benefits will be divided in half!"

"Golden Divine Armor Stone and Silver Heng Heavenly Ancestor's Token!!"

The Copper Mountain Ancestor hesitated.

Although the token of Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor is more valuable, it is useless to him, and it is not easy to trade, so it is okay to give up.

But the Golden God Armor Stone is really a good thing, once he obtains it, his strength will skyrocket, even if it is a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform that has been tempered four or five times throughout his body, don't want to kill him easily, it is really a good thing to save his life!

However, if he didn't agree, it would be impossible for him to kill Ye Tian himself!

"Okay, I agree!"

Tongshan Great Ancestor nodded and said.
